# Eave — Home upkeep without the overwhelm

> Eave (eavehome.app) is a personal home management app. It is the home's
> memory: owners capture anything by voice, photo, or text — a repair, an
> appliance data plate, a receipt — and Eave keeps the specs, schedules the
> upkeep, and sends reminders with one-tap actions before things matter.

## What Eave does

- Capture: speak, snap, or type a home issue; Eave returns a scoped plan —
  materials with prices, tools needed, DIY difficulty, tutorials, or local
  pros to call, plus an all-in budget.
- Systems & appliances: photograph a data plate and Eave identifies the unit,
  auto-researches specs (including consumable sizes like furnace filters),
  tracks warranties and service history, and proposes its real maintenance
  schedule from a curated rule library.
- Reminders: task-due, "time to buy" consumable reorder (suppressed
  automatically when you already have the part on hand), and warranty-expiry
  alerts, delivered by push notification.
- Memory: rooms, finishes, contractors used, purchases, and documents stay
  attached to the property — searchable years later.
- Upkeep Score: a live 0–100 home-health score with a ranked weekly queue and
  "why now" reasoning.

## Pricing

- Eave Free: $0 forever, one property, works in any browser at
  https://app.eavehome.app — projects, tasks, systems & appliances, spaces,
  budget tracking, contractors, Upkeep Score.
- Eave Intelligence: from $2.99/month ($24/year, $49 lifetime) — AI project
  queue, 12-month upkeep plan, seasonal prep digest, materials estimates and
  vendor research.
- Eave Pro: professional services starting with licensed Home Audits
  ($499–$799 one-time by home size); seasonal coordination and full home
  management are on the waitlist.

## Facts

- Platform: web app live at https://app.eavehome.app; native iOS and Android
  apps coming soon.
- Data policy: connected-source imports (email, store accounts) are reviewed
  by the owner before anything saves.
- Company: Limbic Ventures. Support: support@limbicventures.com.

## Key pages

- https://eavehome.app/ — product overview, how it works, pricing
- https://eavehome.app/support — support hub: help topics, tutorials, contact
- https://eavehome.app/support/getting-started — what Eave is, what it costs,
  and setting up your home (property profile, spaces, appliances, Home Score)
- https://eavehome.app/support/using-eave — AI Capture, room scanning,
  connected sources, shopping lists, seasonal maintenance, projects
- https://eavehome.app/support/data-privacy — what Eave reads and doesn't,
  row-level security, data ownership, export and deletion
- https://eavehome.app/support/billing — plans, subscription management,
  refunds
- https://eavehome.app/guides — step-by-step guides hub
- https://eavehome.app/guides/first-10-minutes-in-eave — full first-time setup
- https://eavehome.app/guides/scanning-a-room-with-photos — photo room scanning
- https://eavehome.app/guides/capturing-a-project-by-voice-or-text — AI capture
- https://eavehome.app/guides/connecting-gmail-for-receipts — Gmail connection
- https://eavehome.app/guides/seasonal-maintenance-setup — seasonal checklist
- https://eavehome.app/privacy — privacy policy
- https://eavehome.app/terms — terms of service
